svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="OynyY0etpmw3ZarKGT8K"> <mxGraphModel dx="2357" dy="1248" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant C as Customer
 participant BC as BookingsController
 participant Guard as JWT + Roles Guards
 participant BS as BookingsService
 participant DB as PostgreSQL

 C->>BC: POST /bookings
 BC->>Guard: require CUSTOMER
 Guard-->>BC: authenticated customer
 BC->>BS: create(user, dto)
 BS->>DB: begin transaction
 BS->>DB: read ticket category with concert
 alt invalid concert/category/state/quantity
 BS->>DB: rollback
 BS-->>BC: 404/409
 else valid
 BS->>DB: conditional update TicketCategory.sold
 alt no row updated
 BS->>DB: rollback
 BS-->>BC: 409 not enough tickets
 else reserved
 BS->>DB: create Booking PENDING
 BS->>DB: create BookingItem snapshot
 BS->>DB: commit
 BS-->>BC: BookingResponse
 BC-->>C: 201
 end
 end
",
 "config": null
}" id="cy5-3Th3e6YrIVTDAqyU-52"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=10;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
